com.marklogic.spring.batch.test

Class AbstractJobRunnerTest

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.junit.Assert
      • com.marklogic.junit.XmlHelper
        • com.marklogic.junit.BaseTestHelper
          • com.marklogic.junit.spring.AbstractSpringTest
            • com.marklogic.spring.batch.test.AbstractJobRunnerTest
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    com.marklogic.junit.TestHelper, org.springframework.beans.factory.Aware, org.springframework.context.ApplicationContextAware

    @ContextConfiguration(classes=JobRunnerContext.class)
public abstract class AbstractJobRunnerTest
extends com.marklogic.junit.spring.AbstractSpringTest
